description: Create a plan-view drawing of an ADA-compliant U-shaped switchback ramp system in LibreCAD (1 unit = 1 inch). The drawing must include a 'CONCRETE' layer (Color: Gray or White) and a 'HANDRAILS' layer (Color: Red or Cyan). The concrete structure consists of a 60" x 60" top landing, a 48" x 360" first ramp run, a 60" x 108" intermediate switchback landing, and a 48" x 360" second ramp run parallel to the first with a 12" gap. Continuous handrails on the 'HANDRAILS' layer must be inset 2" from all concrete edges. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/ada_ramp_plan.dxf.
